post.description: Old tutorial expected Pipelines under 'CI/CD' section
Old tutorial expected 'Editor' link under 'CI/CD' section

meta.rationale: GitLab reorganized their sidebar navigation in March 2023, moving all CI/CD menu items into a new 'Build' category and renaming some items for clarity: 'Editor' became 'Pipeline editor' and 'Schedules' became 'Pipeline schedules'. The actual destinations and functionality remained identical - clicking 'Pipelines' still goes to the pipelines page, 'Pipeline editor' still opens the editor - but old tutorials that instructed users to look for items under the 'CI/CD' section or click on 'Editor' (not 'Pipeline editor') would fail verification because the sidebar category label and menu item names changed, even though the navigation targets are the same.

postcondition_changes.navigation_unchanged: Same sidebar location, same destinations, only category and item labels changed
postcondition_changes.note: Feature Flags, Environments, and Releases also moved from Operate to Build category
